query:
-- Ver vínculos médico-unidade
SELECT uup.user_id, u2.name as user_name, u2.role, uup.unit_id, u.name as unit_name, uup.role as perm_role
FROM user_unit_permissions uup
JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = uup.user_id
JOIN units u ON u.id = uup.unit_id
ORDER BY uup.unit_id, uup.user_id;

-- Ver preços de médico já configurados
SELECT bdp.id, bdp.unit_id, u.name as unit_name, bdp.doctor_user_id, usr.name as doctor_name, bdp.price_per_report, bdp.starts_at, bdp.ends_at
FROM billing_doctor_unit_prices bdp
JOIN units u ON u.id = bdp.unit_id
JOIN users usr ON usr.id = bdp.doctor_user_id
ORDER BY bdp.unit_id, bdp.starts_at DESC;
